haikus.haiku:
Chilled glasses clink bright,
Fizzy bubbles dance with joy,
Cheers to flavors bold!
Happy #NationalBeverageDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunshine spills like gold,
Children's giggles dance like sparks,
Joyful plans unfold.
Happy #NoHomeworkDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright candles dancing,
Thoughts weave through sweetened moments,
Joy wrapped in silence.
#HappyBirthdaySigmundFreud from @ClamBakeSanta
